detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DogeWars._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DogeWars.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DogeWars.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DogeWars.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DogeWars.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DogeWars.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DogeWars.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DogeWars.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DogeWars.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DogeWars.sol#925)
	DogeWars._rOwned (DogeWars.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DogeWars._takeTeam(uint256) (DogeWars.sol#937-945)
	- DogeWars._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DogeWars.sol#897-933)
	- DogeWars.balanceOf(address) (DogeWars.sol#485-489)
	- DogeWars.constructor() (DogeWars.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DogeWars.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DogeWars.sol#951)
	DogeWars._rTotal (DogeWars.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DogeWars._getCurrentSupply() (DogeWars.sol#1093-1103)
	- DogeWars._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DogeWars.sol#949-955)
	- DogeWars.constructor() (DogeWars.sol#419-449)
	- DogeWars.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DogeWars.sol#581-603)

	- [DogeWars._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](DogeWars.sol#L897-L933)

	- [DogeWars.constructor()](DogeWars.sol#L419-L449)

	[DogeWars._rTotal](DogeWars.sol#L343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

	- [DogeWars._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](DogeWars.sol#L949-L955)
